name: zoho-crm
description: Read, search, create, and update records in Zoho CRM modules such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, and Accounts

envVars.name: ZOHO_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Zoho OAuth Client ID from the Zoho API Console

envVars.name: ZOHO_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.description: Zoho OAuth Client Secret from the Zoho API Console

tools.name: List Records
tools.description: List records from a Zoho CRM module such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

module.description: Module API name, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

fields.description: Comma-separated field API names to return (required, max 50), e.g. Last_Name,Email,Company

sort_by.description: Field to sort by: id, Created_Time, or Modified_Time

tools.name: Get Record
tools.description: Get a single Zoho CRM record by ID from any module

module.description: Module API name, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

fields.description: Optional comma-separated field API names to return

tools.name: Search Records
tools.description: Search records in a Zoho CRM module by criteria, email, phone, or a free-text word

module.description: Module API name, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

criteria.description: Field criteria in the form ((Field:operator:value)), e.g. ((Last_Name:equals:Smith)). Takes precedence over email, phone, and word.

email.description: Search all email fields in the module for this address

phone.description: Search all phone fields in the module for this number

word.description: Global free-text search across module fields

fields.description: Optional comma-separated field API names to return

tools.name: Get Fields Metadata
tools.description: List the field metadata of a Zoho CRM module so agents can discover the field API names required by list, search, and write tools

module.description: Module API name to get fields for, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

tools.name: Run COQL Query
tools.description: Run a CRM Object Query Language (COQL) SELECT query for filtered reads, joins, and aggregation that the list and search tools cannot express

select_query.description: COQL SELECT statement, e.g. select Last_Name, Email from Leads where Lead_Status = 'Contacted' limit 50. Max 2000 rows per call (use limit/offset), max 25 criteria in the where clause.

tools.name: Create Records
tools.description: Create up to 100 records in a Zoho CRM module (requires the ZohoCRM.modules.CREATE scope)

module.description: Module API name, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

data.description: Array of record objects keyed by field API names, e.g. [{"Last_Name":"Smith","Company":"Acme"}]

tools.name: Update Record
tools.description: Update fields on an existing Zoho CRM record (requires the ZohoCRM.modules.UPDATE scope)

module.description: Module API name, such as Leads, Contacts, Deals, or Accounts

recordId.description: Zoho CRM record ID to update

data.description: Array with one record object of field API names to update, e.g. [{"Lead_Status":"Contacted"}]

prompts.title: Find leads
prompts.prompt: Search my Zoho CRM leads and summarize the most recent ones with their status and contact details.

prompts.title: Create a lead
prompts.prompt: Create a new lead in Zoho CRM with the details I provide.

prompts.title: Deal pipeline
prompts.prompt: List my open deals in Zoho CRM and summarize the pipeline by stage and amount.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Zoho CRM setup

steps.title: Create a Zoho account with CRM
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.zoho.com/crm/ — the free edition (up to 3 users) is enough for development, or use an existing Zoho CRM org. Zoho also offers a developer sandbox via Zoho CRM Settings > Sandbox.

steps.title: Register an OAuth client
steps.description: Open the Zoho API Console at https://api-console.zoho.com/, click Add Client, and choose Server-based Applications. Set the Authorized Redirect URI to your app's callback URL (the /oauth/callback/zoho-crm path on your deployment).

steps.title: Copy the client credentials
steps.description: After creating the client, copy the Client ID into ZOHO_CLIENT_ID and the Client Secret into ZOHO_CLIENT_SECRET.

steps.title: Authorize with the right scopes
steps.description: The default scopes grant read, search, field-metadata, and COQL access (ZohoCRM.modules.READ, ZohoSearch.securesearch.READ, ZohoCRM.settings.fields.READ, ZohoCRM.coql.READ). Enable the optional ZohoCRM.modules.CREATE and ZohoCRM.modules.UPDATE scopes if agents should create or update records.

notes: Zoho accounts live in region-specific datacenters. This connector defaults to accounts.zoho.com (US). If your org is in another region, use the matching accounts domain for the authorization and token URLs: accounts.zoho.eu (EU), accounts.zoho.in (India), accounts.zoho.com.au (Australia), accounts.zoho.jp (Japan), accounts.zohocloud.ca (Canada), accounts.zoho.sa (Saudi Arabia), or accounts.zoho.com.cn (China).
API calls automatically use the api_domain returned with your OAuth token (for example https://www.zohoapis.com for US or https://www.zohoapis.eu for EU), so tool URLs follow your org's region.
The authorization request uses access_type=offline so Zoho issues a refresh token; access tokens expire after one hour and are refreshed automatically.
The fields query parameter is mandatory when listing module records and accepts at most 50 field API names.
